description: PR6 commit 6 — rooming-repair stage telemetry. Mirrors pr5_rooming_repair: section has a baseline UNASSIGNED placement the second pass can repair. First pass rejects the tight room via the 1.1 capacity buffer (demand 35, TIGHT capacity 35 -> needs 39); a larger ROOMY room is picked up by the repair pass. With TIMETABLE_PR6_STAGE_TELEMETRY_ENABLED=True, stage_telemetry.stage_ms.rooming_repair > 0 and stage_iterations.rooming_repair == reassignments count (matches ROOMING_REPAIR_REASSIGNED semantics). Test drives assign_rooms_to_board directly with the UNASSIGNED placement so timing is scoped to repair only.
notes: Test calls assign_rooms_to_board directly with a UNASSIGNED-seeded placement so telemetry is scoped to the repair pass only.
Demand 35, TIGHT raw cap 35 rejected by 1.1 buffer (needs 39); ROOMY cap 60 picked up by repair pass.
rooming_repair.iterations counts reassignments (matches ROOMING_REPAIR_REASSIGNED emission count).
Flag-off variant must leave all five stage keys at 0 even though ROOMING_REPAIR_REASSIGNED still emits to decision trace.
